rationale: Skipped transaction spec tests expose mongos pinning bugs; fixing driver to implement mongos pinning per transactions spec.
Internal refactor of _has_out_key to only inspect last pipeline stage; no spec behavior change.
Internal code generation change to use IDL for aggregate options parsing; no behavior change.
When server_id passed directly, server selection bypassed and session not pinned to mongos per transactions spec.
Driver still resumes after NonResumableChangeStreamError; spec via SPEC-1309 test requires no resumption for these errors.
Uninitialized bson_error_t in GSSAPI/SSPI auth with pooled client; implementation bug, no specific spec rule violated.
Hardcoded libdir in CMakeLists.txt cannot be overridden; build/packaging issue.
Uninitialized BSON reply crash when command runs on wrong server with pinned session; implementation crash bug.
Empty description; investigating change stream prose test 14 case. Insufficient detail to classify.
Driver always appends resumeAfter on resume; spec requires startAfter when no document received since last resume token.
CMake version reduction for zstd support and Evergreen variant configuration; build/CI improvement.
Retryable reads spec mandates certain documentation that was missed; missing docs, not behavioral nonconformance.
Export CMake targets for libmongoc so downstream projects can use find_package; build/packaging improvement.
Description says needed 'to fully be spec-compliant'; transaction options applied at start must be accessible per spec.
Sync auth spec test files; depends DRIVERS-472 cross-driver coordination ticket; test infrastructure update.
SRV callback uses fixed 1024-byte buffer, truncating longer DNS responses; implementation limitation, no spec buffer rule.
listIndexNames.json expectations reference wrong command name; fixing JSON test file expectations per DRIVERS-748.
SSL/TLS commands fail on macOS with certain server configurations; implementation bug, no spec rule violated.
Change stream creation not retried despite retryReads=true; retryable reads spec requires client.watch to be retried.
txn_opts_cleanup doesn't reset max_commit_time_ms; transaction options should be scoped per-transaction per spec.
Bulk OP_INSERTs not batched with unacknowledged write concerns; implementation behavior, cannot name specific spec rule violated.
mongoc_client_reset() in forked child disconnects SSL sockets in parent; fork-safety implementation bug.
URI parsing truncates wTimeoutMS to 32-bit; write concern spec requires full 64-bit value support.
Libraries overlinked when libmongoc found via cmake on macOS; build/packaging issue.
Feature request to increase socket send/receive buffer sizes for performance; not spec-related.
Homebrew --HEAD install reports version 0.0.0; build tooling/cmake version calculation issue.
zstd not listed as explicit link dependency for static libmongoc; packaging/cmake issue.
SCRAM spec requires server proof validation; driver accepts premature {done:1} without validating server proof.
ASAN test tasks can't download MongoDB 3.0 for Ubuntu 16.04; CI infrastructure issue.
mongoc_uri_get_tls ignores tlsInsecure and tlsCertificateKeyFilePassword; connection string spec requires TLS implicitly enabled for these options.
Replace strncpy with safer strncpy_s where available beyond MSVC; code safety improvement.
Incorrect relative #include paths in bson.h cause guaranteed-to-fail filesystem reads; build/header issue.
CMakeLists.txt uses cmake command unavailable in required cmake version; build breakage.
Buffer overflow in jsonsl vendored JSON parser component (SECURITY-606); security fix, no spec behavior.
cmake install prefix not respected when building on Windows with MSYS; build/packaging issue.
ASAN crash in /bson/oid/after_fork test on macOS; test infrastructure/ASAN false positive issue.
After retryable write retry selects new server, later bulk write commands still use old server; spec requires new server.
bson_value_copy on empty binary produces NULL data, then bson_append_binary asserts non-NULL; BSON crash bug.
SIGABRT assertion hit in handshake against unknown server type; implementation crash, no specific spec rule.
Buffer overflow in libbson base64 parsing on invalid input (SECURITY-607); security fix, not spec behavior.
zstd not listed as Debian package dependency; older Ubuntu distros have incompatible zstd version; packaging issue.
mongoc_cluster_fetch_stream_single calls BSON_ASSERT on invalid server_id; API robustness bug, not spec violation.
Connections survive primary stepdown tests updated to always verify successful insert per DRIVERS-749.
Add missing spec tests for aggregation pipeline in bulk write updates; Issue split from DRIVERS-744.
mongoc_uri_get_tls is case-sensitive while spec-compliant functions are case-insensitive; connection string spec requires case-insensitive option names.
Document that bson_append_utf8/symbol append BSON NULL when passed NULL argument; documentation, not behavioral fix.
Sessions spec MUST discard server sessions on network errors; driver missing this required behavior per DRIVERS-649.
mongoc.org website search returns no results; website/UI bug, no spec or driver behavior involved.
valid_hostname rejects trailing dots; trailing dots valid per RFC 952/1123 and tracked in DRIVERS-2057/2087.
mongoc_cursor_destroy skips exhaust cursor teardown based on client generation mismatch; implementation lifecycle bug.
